description: Vertical graphic card in a Fox News style. At the top, on a white band, is the 'FOX NEWS' logo, followed by a large black serif headline: "Labor secretary announces 'strike team' going to Minnesota to investigate rampant fraud". A torn-paper edge separates the white headline area from the lower photographic half, which shows Donald Trump from the knees up at a rally. He wears a dark navy suit, white shirt and purple patterned tie with an American-flag lapel pin, smiling and pointing toward the viewer. Behind him is a blurred crowd in red and green clothing and a blue backdrop. A small white Department of Labor eagle and seal watermark sits in the lower-left corner.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; Labor secretary announces 'strike team' going to Minnesota to investigate rampant fraud
